title: Undertake preparation of land for agricultural crop production
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Undertake preparation of land for agricultural crop production demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine requirements for land preparation

pcs.text: Confirm work requirements from crop production plan with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm work requirements from crop production plan with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm work requirements from crop production plan with supervisor.

pcs.text: Confirm method of land preparation and order of work from crop production plan

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify work health and safety hazards, assess risk and implement controls according to workplace health and safety procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE).
